tasks.label: Configure, Build & Install Horde Mod (MinGW)
tasks.command: rm -rf build && mkdir build && cd build && echo '--- Running CMake Configure ---' && cmake .. -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=../mingw-w64-x86_64.cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -G "Unix Makefiles" -DDEPLOY_DIRECTORY="${input:deployPathInput}" && echo '--- Running Make ---' && make -j$(nproc) && echo '--- Running Make Install ---' && make install

inputs.description: Enter the absolute path for deployment (e.g., /path/to/Quake2/baseq2)
